description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests that runs on push to the master branch and on pull requests to any branch. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-latest to test multiple Python versions (3.9 to 3.13) sequentially. For each version, check out the repository, set up Python with pip caching, install requirements from test-requirements.txt, and run pytest with coverage for the toggl module using the TOGGL_API_TOKEN from secrets.
